section_miscategorizations.text: A right upper quadrant ultrasound is ordered.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Ordering an ultrasound is a management action/plan, not an observed finding or completed test result.
Sending a lab panel is an order/management action and belongs in the Plan, not in Objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: A right upper quadrant ultrasound is planned.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This duplicates the earlier statement that the ultrasound was ordered in the Objective section; the plan should consolidate the ordering here, and the Objective section should only contain completed or observed data.
